name: player_season_projected_pass_yds range year_offset re-scans projections_index with numeric week + seas_type discriminators
description: projections_index-backed projected stat (additive count, SUM is correct) with range year_offset=[1,2] re-scans projections_index pinned to sourceid=18, numeric week=0, seas_type=REG and year IN (2024,2025).
expected_query: select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, (SELECT SUM(projections_index.passing_yards) FROM projections_index WHERE projections_index.pid = player.pid AND projections_index.season_year IN (2024,2025) AND projections_index.sourceid = 18 AND projections_index.week = 0 AND projections_index.season_type = 'REG') AS "season_projected_pass_yds_0", "player"."primary_position" from "player" group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
